subcodes.title: Kitab al-Vahid 15 (Tablet to the fifteenth Letter of the Living)
subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who bestoweth grace upon whomsoever He willeth by His command, and before Whom all prostrate themselves. He it is Who giveth life and causeth death. Say: All return unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله العلی العظیم. سبحان الذی من علی من یشآء بأمره و کل له ساجدون هو الذی یحیی و یمیت قل کل الیه راجعون
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @power of prayer
